mapper.select: select user_id, user_name from student where delete_flg = false
select product_id, product_style_name, product_name from product where delete_flg = false
select process_id, product_id, process_name from process where delete_flg = false
select process_id, product_id, user_id, use_date from piece_rate_pay_total where delete_flg = false
mapper.insert:
insert into piece_rate_pay_total ( user_id, product_id, process_id, use_num, use_date, create_date_time, update_date_time ) values
( #{dto.userId}, #{dto.productId}, #{dto.processId}, #{dto.useNum}, CAST(#{dto.useDate} AS DATE), current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
